subcodes.first_line: The Sun of Glory hath dawned from the horizon of eternity, adorned with the ornament of God, the Almighty, the Most Exalted of the Most Exalted. Say: Perish, O ye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرقت شمس البهی عن افق البقا بطراز الله المقتدر العلی الاعلی قل موتوا یا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as sun, @chastisement and requital
